caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters sits at a dark table. He wears a gold chain and a gold watch on his left wrist. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring a repeating logo that says "UNICORN HUSTLE" accompanied by five gold stars. To his right, a professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned close to his face. Behind him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table, a black object with a red "BOSS TALK" logo and a white mug with red "BOSS TALK" text are visible. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing slightly with his hands, while his facial expressions shift as he talks. The camera angle and the surrounding equipment remain static.
